name: citation-checker
description: Portable agent skill for auditing legal citation footnotes in Word documents.

interface.shortDescription: Audit legal citations in Word footnotes
interface.longDescription: Audit Word .docx footnotes for legal citation formatting, Id. and supra issues, source verification candidates, and approved tracked-change corrections.
defaultPrompt: Audit this Word article's footnote citations.
Check supra and Id. usage in this .docx.
